prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document discusses licensing for movements of poultry and related activities specifically within the jurisdiction of the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA), which operates in England. The procedures and requirements outlined are pertinent to England's regulations regarding bird flu management.
